languages.text: {n}Маражай суживает глаза, рассматривая портал. Поймав ваш взгляд, {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}друкари{/g} едва заметно качает головой.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Маражай суживает глаза, рассматривая портал. Поймав ваш взгляд, {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}друкари{/g} едва заметно качает головой.{/n}
traits.speaker: MarazhaiCompanion

languages.text: {n}Marazhai narrows his eyes, surveying the portal. Catching your gaze, the {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} gives a subtle shake of his head.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Маражай суживает глаза, рассматривая портал. Поймав ваш взгляд, {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}друкари{/g} едва заметно качает головой.{/n}

{n}Marazhai narrows his eyes, surveying the portal. Catching your gaze, the Drukhari gives a subtle shake of his head.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Marazhai entrecierra los ojos, analizando el portal. Al ver tu mirada, el {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} niega sutilmente con la cabeza.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai narrows his eyes, surveying the portal. Catching your gaze, the {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} gives a subtle shake of his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Marazhai entrecierra los ojos, analizando el portal. Al ver tu mirada, el {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} niega sutilmente con la cabeza.{/n}

languages.text: {n}玛拉斋眯起眼睛，打量着传送门。捕捉到你的目光后，这个{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}黑暗灵族{/g}微微摇了摇头。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai narrows his eyes, surveying the portal. Catching your gaze, the {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} gives a subtle shake of his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}玛拉斋眯起眼睛，打量着传送门。捕捉到你的目光后，这个{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}黑暗灵族{/g}微微摇了摇头。{/n}

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Marazhai{/g} observe le portail en plissant les yeux. Lorsqu'il remarque que vous le regardez, il secoue subtilement la tête.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai narrows his eyes, surveying the portal. Catching your gaze, the {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} gives a subtle shake of his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Marazhai{/g} observe le portail en plissant les yeux. Lorsqu'il remarque que vous le regardez, il secoue subtilement la tête.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Marazhai, gözlerini kısarak geçidi inceliyor. Bakışlarını yakalayan {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}, hafifçe başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai narrows his eyes, surveying the portal. Catching your gaze, the {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} gives a subtle shake of his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Marazhai, gözlerini kısarak geçidi inceliyor. Bakışlarını yakalayan {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}, hafifçe başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Marazhai beobachtet das Portal mit zusammengekniffenen Augen. Als er deinen Blick bemerkt, schüttelt der {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} dezent den Kopf.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai narrows his eyes, surveying the portal. Catching your gaze, the {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} gives a subtle shake of his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Marazhai beobachtet das Portal mit zusammengekniffenen Augen. Als er deinen Blick bemerkt, schüttelt der {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} dezent den Kopf.{/n}

languages.text: {n}マラーザイは目を細めてポータルを眺める。あなたの視線を捉え、{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}ドルカリ{/g}は微妙に首を振る。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai narrows his eyes, surveying the portal. Catching your gaze, the {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} gives a subtle shake of his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}マラーザイは目を細めてポータルを眺める。あなたの視線を捉え、{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}ドルカリ{/g}は微妙に首を振る。{/n}
